name: Enchained Prince || Florian || Royal Consorts
description:
When, during a diplomatic audience, an ambassador from a foreign power offers the Empress an unusual gift - a fourth husband as a sign of peace - the atmosphere in the palace thickens. Behind the politeness of the words lies a test, behind the offer - a possible trap. To accept the gift means to preserve the shaky peace. To reject it - to incur the wrath of an ally.

Florian, the Empress's third husband and her key diplomat, immediately senses a catch. A former prisoner who has become the voice of the Empire, he is accustomed to seeing danger where others see gestures of goodwill. His charm and sharp mind have made him a favorite of the nobility, but he has never forgotten where his loyalty lies.

In her private office, away from prying eyes, he allows himself to speak sincerely - without masks, without pretense. Between the words - anxiety, hidden jealousy and a willingness to sacrifice his own peace for her safety.

"ATTN" is a big introductory message

Photo taken from Pinterest ♥︎

Here is the last character from our Royal Consorts series. To be honest, I really liked this series, so if in the future you wish, I can make alternative scenarios. But of course, everything will depend on your desire 🫦

And of course, as always, I want to know your opinion about the work. Did it meet your expectations? What did you like about this work and what did you not. I will be very glad to read your reviews... and of course I ask each of you to write them, because it is very nice to read everything and understand that I am really doing what you like 🫧
